'''鈭歴-d-ch-w''' ('''kasadchewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beblubber|beblubber]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beblubber|beblubber]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-d-ch-w
|-
! Lemma
| kasadchewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadchewoko|thisadchewoko]] || [[word:jisadchewoko|jisadchewoko]] || [[word:shisadchewoko|shisadchewoko]] || [[word:kisadchewoko|kisadchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadchewoko|thuthusadchewoko]] || [[word:jujusadchewoko|jujusadchewoko]] || [[word:shushusadchewoko|shushusadchewoko]] || [[word:kukusadchewoko|kukusadchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusadchewoko|thusadchewoko]] || [[word:jusadchewoko|jusadchewoko]] || [[word:shusadchewoko|shusadchewoko]] || [[word:kusadchewoko|kusadchewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusadchewoko|thusadchewoko]] || [[word:jusadchewoko|jusadchewoko]] || [[word:shusadchewoko|shusadchewoko]] || [[word:kusadchewoko|kusadchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesadchewoko|thesadchewoko]] || [[word:jesadchewoko|jesadchewoko]] || [[word:shesadchewoko|shesadchewoko]] || [[word:kesadchewoko|kesadchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosadchewoko|thothosadchewoko]] || [[word:jojosadchewoko|jojosadchewoko]] || [[word:shoshosadchewoko|shoshosadchewoko]] || [[word:kokosadchewoko|kokosadchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadchewoko|thosadchewoko]] || [[word:josadchewoko|josadchewoko]] || [[word:shosadchewoko|shosadchewoko]] || [[word:kosadchewoko|kosadchewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadchewoko|thosadchewoko]] || [[word:josadchewoko|josadchewoko]] || [[word:shosadchewoko|shosadchewoko]] || [[word:kosadchewoko|kosadchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sadchewoko|th忙sadchewoko]] || [[word:j忙sadchewoko|j忙sadchewoko]] || [[word:sh忙sadchewoko|sh忙sadchewoko]] || [[word:k忙sadchewoko|k忙sadchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasadchewoko|thathasadchewoko]] || [[word:jajasadchewoko|jajasadchewoko]] || [[word:shashasadchewoko|shashasadchewoko]] || [[word:kakasadchewoko|kakasadchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadchewoko|thasadchewoko]] || [[word:jasadchewoko|jasadchewoko]] || [[word:shasadchewoko|shasadchewoko]] || [[word:kasadchewoko|kasadchewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadchewoko|thasadchewoko]] || [[word:jasadchewoko|jasadchewoko]] || [[word:shasadchewoko|shasadchewoko]] || [[word:kasadchewoko|kasadchewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
